narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 5-B (precinct in Ross County) has 583 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.2 percentage points.
